Package android.car

Class ALN80VehiclePropertyIds

java.lang.Object
android.car.ALN80VehiclePropertyIds
public final class ALN80VehiclePropertyIds extends Object
List of N80 vehicle property IDs.

Property IDs are used with the android.car.hardware.property.CarPropertyManager APIs (e.g. android.car.hardware.property.CarPropertyManager#getProperty(int, int) or android.car.hardware.property.CarPropertyManager#setProperty(Class, int, int, Object)).

      Function Describe: 仪表显示车速有效性标志位

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:WRITE

      Signal Value:
      0x0: Initializing(Reserved)
      0x1: Valid
      0x2: Invalid
      0x3: Reserved

      Function Describe: 仪表显示速度单位类型

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:WRITE

      Signal Value:
      0x0: initializing
      0x1: the metric system
      0x2: the British system
      0x3: invalid

    • ODOTICKVAL_2E0

      public static final int ODOTICKVAL_2E0
      ODOTICKVAL_2E0


      Function Describe: ODO ERROR情况下，当ICM总里程每增加10km时，该信号由0x0跳变为0x1，并连续发10帧，然后再持续发0x0。

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:WRITE

      Signal Value:
      0x0: Inactive
      0x1: Active
      0x2: Reserved
      0x3: Invalid (Reserved)

      • Constant Field Values

      0x0: Initializing(Reserved)
      0x1: Once

      0x7: Invalid

    • BMS_ALLWREMHEATGSTS_201

      public static final int BMS_ALLWREMHEATGSTS_201
      BMS_ALLWREMHEATGSTS_201


      Function Describe: BMS允许远程加热状态

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: 初始值
      0x1: BMS允许远程加热
      0x2: SOC低， 不允许远程加热
      0x3: 电池温度低，不允许远程加热
      0x4: Void
      0x5: BMS故障
      0x6: 温度满足要求，不需要远程加热
      0x7: 车辆充电中，不需要远程加热

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • BMS_CHRGSTSDISP_201

      public static final int BMS_CHRGSTSDISP_201
      BMS_CHRGSTSDISP_201


      Function Describe: 充电状态（显示）

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: 初始值
      0x1: 充电准备中
      0x2: 交流充电中（慢充中）
      0x3: 无线充电中
      0x4: 超级充电中
      0x5: 直流充电中（快充中）
      0x6: 交流充电预加热中
      0x7: 无线充电预加热中
      0x8: 直流充电预加热中
      0x9: 交流充电保温中
      0xA: 无线充电保温中
      0xB: 直流充电保温中
      0xC: 充电结束
      0xD: 充电故障结束
      0xE~0x1F: Reserved

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • BMS_BATTLOWTEMPINDCR_201

      public static final int BMS_BATTLOWTEMPINDCR_201
      BMS_BATTLOWTEMPINDCR_201


      Function Describe: 电池低温指示

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: 无指示
      0x1: 指示

      • Constant Field Values

    • BMS_CHRGSTSPROMT_201

      public static final int BMS_CHRGSTSPROMT_201
      BMS_CHRGSTSPROMT_201


      Function Describe: 充电相关状态提示

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: 不显示
      0x1: 电池处于健康充电中，充电时间将延长
      0x2: 为保护长期放置的电池，正在启动小电流激活充电，充电时间将延长
      0x3: 车辆空调开启，充电功率降低，充电时间将延长
      0x4: 动力电池加热已开启
      0x5: 充电桩电压输出能力无法满足车辆需求，车辆无法充满，建议更换充电桩
      0x6: 充电桩功率低于车辆最大允许充电功率，充电时间将延长
      0x7: 充电插座过温，功率受限，请联系授权经销商
      0x8: 车载充电机过温，功率受限，请联系授权经销商
      0x9~0xFF: 预留

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • BMS_CHRGDCHAFLTPROMT_201

      public static final int BMS_CHRGDCHAFLTPROMT_201
      BMS_CHRGDCHAFLTPROMT_201


      Function Describe: 充放电停止原因提示

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: 不显示
      0x1: 车辆充电系统故障，请重试或联系经销商
      0x2: 车辆续驶里程低于放电截止里程，放电停止
      0x3: 车辆达到充电截止SOC，充电停止
      0x4: 充电桩通讯异常，请检查充电桩状态并重试
      0x5: 充电停止:充电桩异常输出，为保护动力电池，已自动停止充电，若继续使用该充电桩存在损伤电池的风险，建议更换充电桩
      0x6: 充电停止:充电桩电压输出能力无法满足车辆需求，车辆无法充电，建议更换充电桩
      0x7: 充电桩电网断电
      0x8: 充电桩供电异常，请检查充电桩状态并重试
      0x9: 车辆放电系统故障，请重试或联系经销商。
      0xA: 充电设备功率不足，无法开启电池加热
      0xB: 充电设备功率不足，无法开启电池保温
      0xC: 车辆低于放电截止SOC，放电停止
      0xD: 车辆准备OTA，充电停止；
      0xE~0x2D: 预留
      0x2E: 充电桩停止充电
      0x2F~0xFF: 预留

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • BMS_CHRGOPERGUIDEPROMT_201

      public static final int BMS_CHRGOPERGUIDEPROMT_201
      BMS_CHRGOPERGUIDEPROMT_201


      Function Describe: 充电操作引导提示

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: 不显示
      0x1: 充电枪未完好连接，请重新插拔枪。
      0x2: 放电枪未完好连接，请重新插拔枪。
      0x3: 充电桩未启动，请启动充电桩。
      0x4: 请连接好充电桩或用电设备
      0x5: 请连接用电设备
      0x6: 请连接充电枪
      0x7: 当前即插即充已禁用，请扫码启动充电
      0x8: 充电电流限值已调低，可能异常停止充电，需要移除车内插座上的用电设备
      0x9: 充电电流限值过低，可能异常停止充电，需要更换充电桩或调高充电电流限值
      0xA~0xFF: 预留

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      Function Describe: 换挡操作提醒

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: 初始值
      0x1: 请先减速再换挡
      0x2: 请确认车辆READY后再换挡
      0x3: 请踩制动换挡
      0x4: 不满足换挡条件
      0x5: 充电中 无法换挡
      0x6~0x9: Reserved
      0xA: 请将挡位切换至P挡
      0xB: 请将挡位切换至N挡
      0xC~0xF: Reserved

      0x2: 交流充电口电子锁未正常锁止，充电功率受限，请重试或联系经销商。

    • VCU_USRRMN_575

      public static final int VCU_USRRMN_575
      VCU_USRRMN_575


      Function Describe: 用户人机交互提示

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: 不显示
      0x1: 为保护动力电池，建议将充电截止SOC设置到90%以下
      0x2: 动力电池电量低，请进行充电
      0x3: 动力电池电量低，蓄电池智能充电禁止，车辆长期停放后可能无法启动，请尽快进行充电
      0x4: 蓄电池电量低，车辆可能无法启动，请尽快进行充电
      0x5: 蓄电池智能充电已启动
      0x6: 动力电池热管理系统异常提示
      0x7: 为确保您爱车动力电池保持最佳状态，建议您近期对车辆进行满充电（将电量充至100%）
      0x8~0xF: reserved

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      0x5~0xE: reserved

    • ICC_DRIMODREQ_377

      public static final int ICC_DRIMODREQ_377
      ICC_DRIMODREQ_377


      Function Describe: ICC驾驶模式请求

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:WRITE

      Signal Value:
      0x0: inactive
      0x1: 运动模式请求
      0x2: 舒适模式请求
      0x3: 经济模式请求
      0x4: 雪地模式请求
      0x5: 泥地模式请求
      0x6: 沙地模式 请求
      0x7: One-Pedal模式请求
      0x8: E-Auto模式请求
      0x9~0xA: 预留
      0xB: 极致节能模式请求
      0xC: 个性化模式请求
      0xD: 晕车舒缓模式请求
      0xE~0xF: Reserved

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ICCACTSET3_377

      public static final int ICCACTSET3_377
      ICCACTSET3_377


      Function Describe: 三排温度设置。依据功能规范，低于17℃时显示Low，高于31℃时显示High。

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:WRITE

      Signal Value:
      0x0: Inactive
      0x1~0xF: Reserved
      0x10: Low
      0x11: 17℃
      0x12: 18℃
      0x13: 19℃
      0x14: 20℃
      0x15: 21℃
      0x16: 22℃
      0x17: 23℃
      0x18: 24℃
      0x19: 25℃
      0x1A: 26℃
      0x1B: 27℃
      0x1C: 28℃
      0x1D: 29℃
      0x1E: 30℃
      0x1F: 31℃
      0x20: High
      0x21~0x3E: Reserved
      0x3F: Invalid

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      0x16: 22℃
      0x17: 23℃
      0x18: 24℃
      0x19: 25℃
      0x1A: 26℃
      0x1B: 27℃
      0x1C: 28℃
      0x1D: 29℃
      0x1E: 30℃
      0x1F: 31℃
      0x20: High
      0x21~0x3E: Reserved
      0x3F: Invalid

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ICCACTSET2_377

      public static final int ICCACTSET2_377
      ICCACTSET2_377


      Function Describe: 二排温度设置。依据功能规范，低于17℃时显示Low，高于31℃时显示High

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:WRITE

      Signal Value:
      0x0: Inactive
      0x1~0xF: Reserved
      0x10: Low
      0x11: 17℃
      0x12: 18℃
      0x13: 19℃
      0x14: 20℃
      0x15: 21℃
      0x16: 22℃
      0x17: 23℃
      0x18: 24℃
      0x19: 25℃
      0x1A: 26℃
      0x1B: 27℃
      0x1C: 28℃
      0x1D: 29℃
      0x1E: 30℃
      0x1F: 31℃
      0x20: High
      0x21~0x3E: Reserved
      0x3F: Invalid

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      VCU_INPUT_INTER_SAT_56F

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: 初始值
      0x1: 开启状态
      0x2: 关闭状态
      0x3: Reserved

      • Constant Field Values

    • VCU_SOCKET_FUN_OPER_TIPS_EHU_56F

      public static final int VCU_SOCKET_FUN_OPER_TIPS_EHU_56F
      VCU_SOCKET_FUN_OPER_TIPS_EHU_56F


      Function Describe: 车载插座功能操作提示(中控)

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: 初始值
      0x1: 车辆未解防，请解防后重试
      0x2: 车内温度过高，请降温后使用
      0x3: 电源系统故障，请联系服务商
      0x4: 电量低，请充电后重试
      0x5: 动力电池功率不足，请稍后重试
      0x6: 订单未授权，请确认订单状态
      0x7: 充电桩功率过小，请拔枪后使用
      0x8: 充电功率已降低，若需满功率充电请关闭车载插座
      0x9: 检测到充放电枪，开启充放电后可正常使用
      0xA~0xF: Reserved

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      0x1: 整车系统自检异常，充电功能受限，请保持充电口盖关闭并进店维修。
      0x2~0x7: Reserved

      public static final int ICC_ALZONESWT_3FE
      ICC_ALZONESWT_3FE


      Function Describe: 氛围灯分区开关

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:WRITE

      Signal Value:
      0x0: Inactive
      0x1: FrontOFF(前排区关)
      0x2: FrontON(前排区开)
      0x3: RearOFF(后排区关)
      0x4: RearON(后排区开)
      0x5: RoofOFF(顶棚区关)
      0x6: RoofON(顶棚区开)
      0x7: IPOFF(仪表板氛围灯关)
      0x8: IPON(仪表板氛围灯开)
      0x9: Reserved
      0xA: Invalid

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      public static final int EPBSYSOPERSTS_1A7
      EPBSYSOPERSTS_1A7


      Function Describe: EPB工作状态

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: Status unkown 状态不确定
      0x1: Released 卡钳处于释放状态
      0x2: Closed 卡钳处于夹紧状态
      0x3: Releasing 卡钳正处于释放过程
      0x4: Locking 卡钳正处于夹紧过程
      0x5~0x7: Reserved

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • EPBSYSHMIMSGN3_1A7

      public static final int EPBSYSHMIMSGN3_1A7
      EPBSYSHMIMSGN3_1A7


      Function Describe: 提示信息，告知驾驶员下一步操作，安全带未系或车门未关（与AVH安全带未系或车门未关提示共用）

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: Off
      0x1: Keep The Seatbelt Attached.
      0x2: Keep The Door Closed.
      0x3: Keep The Seatbelt Attached and Keep The Door Closed.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MCUDRVMODSIG_127

      public static final int MCUDRVMODSIG_127
      MCUDRVMODSIG_127


      Function Describe: 驾驶模式信号

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: 初始值
      0x1: 运动模式
      0x2: 舒适模式
      0x3: 经济模式
      0x4: 雪地模式
      0x5: 泥地模式
      0x6: 沙地模式
      0x7: One-Pedal模式
      0x8: E-Auto模式
      0x9: 狂暴模式
      0xA: 赛道模式
      0xB: 极致节能模式
      0xC: 个性化模式
      0xD: 晕车舒缓模式
      0xE~0xF: Reserved

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      0x4: 停止
      0x5~0x7: Reserved

    • VCUCCTIPSENUM_48B

      public static final int VCUCCTIPSENUM_48B
      VCUCCTIPSENUM_48B


      Function Describe: 定速巡航提示

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: 无提示
      0x1: 系统故障，巡航无法开启
      0x2: 请向下拨动两次换挡拨杆后开启巡航
      0x3: 请提高车速后开启巡航
      0x4: 请松开制动后开启巡航
      0x5: 定速巡航激活
      0x6: 定速巡航退出
      0x7~0x8: Reserved

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • VCUCCTARSPDKPH_48B

      public static final int VCUCCTARSPDKPH_48B
      VCUCCTARSPDKPH_48B

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      • Constant Field Values

    • VCU_LNCHCTRLTRIGRMN_48B

      public static final int VCU_LNCHCTRLTRIGRMN_48B
      VCU_LNCHCTRLTRIGRMN_48B


      Function Describe: 弹射起步触发提醒

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: 初始值
      0x1: 条件不满足，弹射起步无法启用（Launch Control unavailable）
      0x2: 弹射起步模式已启用，请等待扭矩加载（Launch Control available，wait for loading Torque）
      0x3: 请快速松开刹车，完成弹射起步（Boost ready，Please release the brake pedal）
      0x4~0x7: Reserved

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • VCU_LNCHCTRLMODDIRMN_48B

      public static final int VCU_LNCHCTRLMODDIRMN_48B
      VCU_LNCHCTRLMODDIRMN_48B


      Function Describe: 弹射起步模式不启用仪表提醒

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: 初始值
      0x1: 整车系统故障，弹射起步模式无法启用（Vehicle system failure，Launch Control unavailable）
      0x2: 动力电池剩余电量较低，弹射起步模式无法启用（SOC too low，Launch Control unavailable）
      0x3: 智能驾驶功能已激活，弹射起步模式无法启用（Intelligent driving function activation，Launch Control unavailable）
      0x4: 请系安全带后启用弹射起步模式（Please fasten your seat belt before enable Launch Control）
      0x5: 加速和制动踏板同时踩下，动力受限(Accelerator and brake pedal are both pressed，power limited)
      0x6: 请挂入D挡后启用弹射起步模式（Please shift into D gear before enable Launch Control）
      0x7: 请切换为运动模式后启用弹射起步模式（Please switching drive mode to sport before enable Launch Control）
      0x8: 请将方向盘回正后启用弹射起步模式(Please turn the steering wheel back before enable Launch Control)
      0x9: 请深踩制动踏板后启用弹射起步模式（Please depress the brake pedal deeply before enable Launch Control）
      0xA: 请深踩加速踏板后启用弹射起步模式（Please depress the acceleration pedal deeply before enable Launch Control）
      0xB~0xF: Reserved

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • VCU_EHUPWROFFENA_484

      public static final int VCU_EHUPWROFFENA_484
      VCU_EHUPWROFFENA_484

      Signal Value:
      0x0: 初始值
      0x1: 未使能
      0x2: 已使能

    • VCU_REMBATTHEATGFAILREASON_511

      public static final int VCU_REMBATTHEATGFAILREASON_511
      VCU_REMBATTHEATGFAILREASON_511


      Function Describe: 远程电池加热失败原因

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: 初始化
      0x1: 当前环境、电池禁止放电
      0x2: SOC低
      0x3: 车辆充电中，无需加热
      0x4: 整车故障
      0x5: 温度满足要求，不需要远程加热
      0x6: 整车正在更新软件，无法开启加热
      0x7: Void

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      PDCUHYDOPERMOD_392


      Function Describe: 混动系统能量流信号

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: 无能量流
      0x1: 空怠速
      0x2: EV两驱
      0x3: 仅增程器发电
      0x4: 能量回收
      0x5: 能量回收+发电
      0x6: 串联驱动
      0x7: 串联助力
      0x8: 串联发电
      0x9~0xF: Reserved

    • PDCUFUFILRDOORRMN_392

      public static final int PDCUFUFILRDOORRMN_392
      PDCUFUFILRDOORRMN_392


      Function Describe: 加油口门状态提醒

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: close （加油口盖关闭）
      0x1: open（加油口盖已打开）
      0x2: please push the fuel filler door opener Button（因超时关闭加油盖，如需加油请重新按加油按钮）
      0x3: please close refuel door （请关闭加油盖）
      0x4: If want to charge，please close refuel door（若想充电或放电，请立即关闭加油口盖）
      0x5~0x7: Reserved（预留）

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PDCUENGSYSTWARN_392

      public static final int PDCUENGSYSTWARN_392
      PDCUENGSYSTWARN_392


      Function Describe: 增程器起机提醒

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: 初始值
      0x1: 已起动增程器，对长期未起动的增程器进行自我养护
      0x2~0x3: Reserved

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      REXERRDISP_392

      0x0: 灯灭
      0x1: 灯亮

      public static final int PDCUTANKCOVERUNLCK_392
      PDCUTANKCOVERUNLCK_392


      Function Describe: 油箱盖解锁命令/加油口门解锁命令

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: No Request
      0x1: Lock Request
      0x2: Unlock Request
      0x3: Not used

      • Constant Field Values

    • PDCUENRGMODFLTHINT_392

      public static final int PDCUENRGMODFLTHINT_392
      PDCUENRGMODFLTHINT_392


      Function Describe: 强制纯电模式异常退出提示

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: 不提示
      0x1: 动力系统故障，退出当前能量模式
      0x2: 电池电量过低，退出当前能量模式
      0x3: 电池功率受限，退出当前能量模式
      0x4: 动力系统不支持，退出当前能量模式
      0x5~0x7: Reserved

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ACLETDISP1_271

      public static final int ACLETDISP1_271
      ACLETDISP1_271


      Function Describe: 1排左温度显示

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: Reserved
      0x1: No Temperature Display
      0x2~0xF: Reserved
      0x10: Low
      0x11: 17℃
      0x12: 18℃
      0x13: 19℃
      0x14: 20℃
      0x15: 21℃
      0x16: 22℃
      0x17: 23℃
      0x18: 24℃
      0x19: 25℃
      0x1A: 26℃
      0x1B: 27℃
      0x1C: 28℃
      0x1D: 29℃
      0x1E: 30℃
      0x1F: 31℃
      0x20: High
      0x21~0x3E: Reserved
      0x3F: Invalid

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      RERISEATBACKMASSGINTENREQ_313


      Function Describe: 右后座椅背按摩强度请求

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:WRITE

      Signal Value:
      0x0: No Request
      0x1: OFF
      0x2: SOFT
      0x3: MEDIUM
      0x4: HEAVY
      0x5~0x6: Reserved
      0x7: Invalid

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PLGM_SOUNDREMDNGREQ_EHU_488

      public static final int PLGM_SOUNDREMDNGREQ_EHU_488
      PLGM_SOUNDREMDNGREQ_EHU_488


      Function Describe: 扬声器提示音请求

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: NO Sound:无操作，无声音提示
      0x1: PTM closing sound:尾门关闭声音提示
      0x2: PTM opening sound:尾门打开声音提示
      0x3: PTM PINCH EVENT sound:尾门防夹声音提示
      0x4: PTM delay close event sound:尾门延时关闭声音提示
      0x5: PTM position reset successful:尾门位置设置声音提示
      0x6~0x7: Reserved

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PLGM_SYSFLTINDCN_488

      public static final int PLGM_SYSFLTINDCN_488
      PLGM_SYSFLTINDCN_488


      Function Describe: 电动尾门系统有故障

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: No Failure
      0x1: Failure happened

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PLGM_TRSWTSTSINDCN_488

      public static final int PLGM_TRSWTSTSINDCN_488
      PLGM_TRSWTSTSINDCN_488


      Function Describe: 后尾门开关状态信号

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: Stop（运行过程中停止/手动操作后停止）
      0x1: Open（开启到目标开度）
      0x2: close（尾门关闭状态）
      0x3: opening（开启过程中）
      0x4: Closing（关闭过程中）
      0x5~0x7: Reserved

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PLGM_ANTIPINCHSTS_488

      public static final int PLGM_ANTIPINCHSTS_488

      VehiclePropertyChangeMode:ON_CHANGE

      VehiclePropertyAccess:READ

      Signal Value:
      0x0: No Pinch
      0x1: Anti-pinch Happened

      • Constant Field Values

      0x4: Mode_4
      0x5: Mode_5
      0x6: Mode_6
      0x7: Mode_7
      0x8: Mode_8
      0x9~0xA: Reserved
      0xB: Error

    • HW_KEY_INPUT

      public static final int HW_KEY_INPUT
      Property to feed H/W input events to android


      int32Values[0] : action defined by VehicleHwKeyInputAction
      int32Values[1] : key code, must use standard android key code
      int32Values[2] : target display defined in VehicleDisplay. Events not tied to specific display must be sent to VehicleDisplay#MAIN.
      int32Values[3] : [optional] Number of ticks. The value must be equal or greater than 1. When omitted, Android will default to 1.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • AP_POWER_STATE_REQ

      public static final int AP_POWER_STATE_REQ
      Property to control power state of application processor.

      Not exposed through android.car.hardware.property.CarPropertyManager.

      Trying to get/set this property will cause SecurityException. Deprecated, use android.car.hardware.power.CarPowerManager instead.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • AP_POWER_STATE_REPORT

      public static final int AP_POWER_STATE_REPORT
      Property to report power state of application processor.

      Not exposed through android.car.hardware.property.CarPropertyManager.

      Trying to get/set this property will cause SecurityException. Deprecated, use android.car.hardware.power.CarPowerManager instead.
